levels.motivazione: Massive Call volume concentration across all three expirations (0DTE 57.6k, WEEKLY 7.1k, MONTHLY 13.2k). Being the highest strike and deep ITM, it acts as a powerful trailing magnet and structural anchor.

Structural equilibrium point and Monthly Max Pain. Far below spot, it defines the ultimate baseline for volatility expansion and dealer hedging shifts.
